title: デビュー戦の後に・突然の大宣言！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa shows off her talents and makes a
successful debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She then makes a surprising declaration—she's
decided not to pursue the Classic Triple Crown in
her classic year. Instead, she has her sights set on
the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She reasons that because her goal is to be the
world's strongest racer, not her generation's
strongest, she must take a different path than her
friends.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her aptitude in mind, we choose the Kyodo
News Hai for our next race. It's the perfect length
and at the perfect time, right after New Year's.
